programme.title: Global Watch
programme.desc: GLOBAL WATCH is a 60 minute-long news program. The show stresses Chinese elements, emphasizing China's perspective, policies and stories.

programme.title: Full Frame
programme.desc: Full Frame enriches the lives of viewers through animated discussion of film, arts and culture, and social trends etc impacting a diverse global audience.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. It presents 360 degree profiles of industry movers and shakers, tech mavericks and policymakers, and drills down on the stories behind their success, to give you clarity on what’s happening in every facet of business.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Talk Africa
programme.desc: Talk Africa is a weekly discussion show that brings the most influential voices in Africa to the world.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Faces of Africa
programme.desc: Faces of Africa is a topical magazine that showcases the diversity of the continent.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN's Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live.

programme.title: Zoom in
programme.desc: A TV news magazine show packed with top stories from around the world. The weekly program zooms in on the details of trending news items and zooms out to give viewers the bigger picture. With in-depth analysis and current perspective, Zoom in takes you on a journey beyond the daily headlines.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: China 24
programme.desc: China 24 is a prime time news program featuring in-depth reports and analysis of the stories in the headlines in China.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation.

programme.title: Big Story
programme.desc: Big Story is a documentary film program on CGTN. It explores global events with in a variety of filmic styles and featuring original, in-depth, thought-provoking storytelling.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Travelogue
programme.desc: Travelogue is a 30-minute travel program. Through the journeys of our intrepid hosts, we experience the beauty, culture and mystery of China, discovering how people live in this vast country and showcasing China's transformation to the world.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already "living in the future"!

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China’s rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country’s culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: Humanities and Geography
programme.desc: A strand devoted to the nature and wildlife of China, the people who lived alongside them, and the great and diverse landscapes with which they all contend.

programme.title: Living China
programme.desc: Real life stories told from the personal perspective. Moving, dramatic, sorrows and joys, expressed emphatically and expressed quietly. Watch closely to see and understand the real China as it is lived.

programme.title: Special Edition
programme.desc: Prestige Chinese documentary production, tackling serious subjects with the best cinematography, editing, and all round production values with a unique Chinese perspective.

programme.title: Journeys and Discoveries
programme.desc: A documentary series showcasing the history of China and its people.

programme.title: History in the Frame
programme.desc: A documentary series featuring historical and archaeological exploration.

programme.title: Best Eats
programme.desc: Food connects people! A feast for the eyes that spotlights the cuisines of China in a way that’s bound to set the mouths of the whole globe watering!

programme.title: Złoto z mroźnej krainy
programme.desc: Ray musi sam zbudować ważne urządzenie. Erik i Christian udają się na sąsiednią działkę, gdzie jest szansa na znalezienie większej ilości złota. Elley wyrusza na poszukiwanie innych kosztowności.

programme.title: Ciężarówką po bezdrożach Australii
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Ciężarówką po bezdrożach Australii S1 Ep2
programme.desc: W Perth samotny kierowca ciężarówki Steve Grahame przygotowuje się do wielkiej wyprawy: liczącej 3 tys. kilometrów drogi na północ Australii Zachodniej.

programme.title: Wielki Mur z Ashem Dykesem
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Wielki Mur z Ashem Dykesem Ep3
programme.desc: Ash bada jeden z najstarszych odcinków Wielkiego Muru w Zhangjiakou, budowany przez osiem kolejnych dynastii. Podąża także śladami starożytnych odkrywców.

programme.title: Pociągi drogowe: Australia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Pociągi drogowe: Australia S1 Ep8
programme.desc: To koniec pory suchej. Des przewozi niewiarygodny ładunek do tajnej kopalni. Glen jedzie niesamowicie niebezpieczną drogą i ma szansę 50% na jej pokonanie.

programme.title: Londyński supertunel: wielkie otwarcie
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Londyński supertunel: wielkie otwarcie Ep2
programme.desc: W tym odcinku oglądamy wielkie otwarcie Elizabeth Line z udziałem samej królowej Elżbiety. To jedno z najambitniejszych osiągnięć inżynieryjnych od czasów Brunela!

programme.title: Złoto z mroźnej krainy
programme.desc: Ray musi sam zbudować ważne urządzenie. Erik i Christian udają się na sąsiednią działkę, gdzie jest szansa na znalezienie większej ilości złota. Elley wyrusza na poszukiwanie innych kosztowności.

programme.title: Ciężarówką po bezdrożach Australii
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Ciężarówką po bezdrożach Australii S1 Ep3
programme.desc: Mark King jest specjalistą od transportu ciężkiego. Tym razem musi przewieźć ogromną platformę do kopalni węgla oddalonej o 700 km; ładunek jest ogromny, a po drodze trzeba będzie pokonać góry...

programme.title: Największe pomyłki inżynierów
programme.sub-title: S06 : E01 Największe pomyłki inżynierów S6 Ep1
programme.desc: W Kalifornii wali się ważny most. Pożar kasyna w Las Vegas wymusza ogromną akcję ratunkową. Co doprowadziło do tragedii w jednym z najszybszych pociągów pasażerskich na świecie w Niemczech?

programme.title: Złoto z mroźnej krainy
programme.desc: Grenlandzka zima zagraża wysiłkom całego zespołu. Poszukiwacze walczą z potężną, arktyczną burzą. Elley powraca; zespół wita ją bardzo chłodno, ale ona wie, jak może ich do siebie przekonać...

programme.title: Drwale z Kolumbii Brytyjskiej
programme.desc: Craig LeBeau i jego ekipa rozbijają obóz w odległej części Shuswap Highlands. Tymczasem Brent oczyszcza drogę dla skuterów śnieżnych na zlecenie lokalnego ośrodka narciarskiego.

programme.title: Ciężarówką po bezdrożach Australii
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Ciężarówką po bezdrożach Australii S1 Ep3
programme.desc: Mark King jest specjalistą od transportu ciężkiego. Tym razem musi przewieźć ogromną platformę do kopalni węgla oddalonej o 700 km; ładunek jest ogromny, a po drodze trzeba będzie pokonać góry...

programme.title: Wielki Mur z Ashem Dykesem
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Wielki Mur z Ashem Dykesem Ep4
programme.desc: Ash obozuje obok odcinka Qin Wielkiego Muru, czeka na wschód słońca, siłuje się z mistrzem Mongolii Wewnętrznej, uczy się od eksperta technik przetrwania na pustyni i szuka zaginionego miasta.

programme.title: Największe pomyłki inżynierów

programme.desc: A bass fishing trip goes horribly wrong when a bolt of lightning strikes their boat, leaving Seventeen-year-old Christian Neal burned and unconscious and his father Gabe blown into the water and paralyzed. It will take a miracle to save them.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Extreme Weather Countdown | Oh Hail No
programme.desc: What's windy, wild, and wet all over? The weather, of course!

programme.title: Diana - wywiad, który wstrząsnał światem
programme.desc: 20 listopada 1995 r. BBC Panorama wyemitowała informację stulecia. Szczery wywiad z księżną Dianą, w którym złamała wszelkie protokoły, obnażając traumy i skandale życia w domu królewskim. 25 lat później film ten ukazuje, jak zorganizowano transmitowane w telewizji wydarzenie stulecia, co wywiad ujawnił na temat współczesnego społeczeństwa, a także nowe spojrzenie na psychologiczny portret samej Diany, naiwnej młodej kobiety, która wierzyła w bajkę o swoim małżeństwie tylko po to, by stracić poczucie siebie w swojej rzeczywistości.

programme.title: Historia Wallis Simpson
programme.desc: Poznaj Hugo Vickersa, królewskiego historyka królowej Elżbiety. Bliskie relacje Hugo z rodziną królewską zapewniają fascynujący wgląd w to, co działo się za kulisami. Dowiadujemy się, jak członkowie rodziny królewskiej postrzegali Wallis i intymne szczegóły z życia księcia i księżnej. Słyszymy także od członków rodziny i innych osób o przeszłości Wallis, odkrywając nową stronę historii, która nigdy wcześniej nie była opowiadana.

programme.title: Kate - Droga do Bycia Nowoczesną Królową
programme.desc: Łącząc niezwykłe materiały filmowe i wywiady z ekspertami, ten autorski dokument przedstawia prawdziwą historię Kate Middleton, pozornie zwyczajnej młodej kobiety, której przeznaczeniem stało się zostać królową Anglii. Pochodząca ze stosunkowo skromnych warunków rodzina Middleton nie mogła bardziej różnić się od rodziny królewskiej. Jednak właśnie tego chciał William - królewskiego życia połączonego z wygodną stabilnością małżeńską i kontynuacją łatwiejszych relacji z Brytyjczykami, zapoczątkowanych przez jego matkę, Dianę.

programme.title: Klejnoty Królewskie - EP 1
programme.desc: Oto historia rubinowej paryry noszonej przez duńską księżną koronną Marię. Został wykonany z okazji wspaniałej koronacji Napoleona w 1804 r., kiedy to na strój wydano niesamowitą kwotę, a oczy wszystkich skupiały się na Francji. Podczas gdy większość monarchii używa symboli władzy królewskiej jedynie podczas sprawowania władzy, jest to także historia najbardziej widocznego znaku godności królewskiej, legitymizacji, kiedy te imponujące klejnoty noszone są na bankietach i wizytach państwowych. Ale niewielu wie, że niektóre z najbardziej fascynujących klejnotów na świecie są często powiązane z ważnymi momentami w historii rodziny królewskiej.

programme.title: Klejnoty Królewskie - EP 2
programme.desc: Oto historia rubinowej paryry noszonej przez duńską księżną koronną Marię. Został wykonany z okazji wspaniałej koronacji Napoleona w 1804 r., kiedy to na strój wydano niesamowitą kwotę, a oczy wszystkich skupiały się na Francji. Podczas gdy większość monarchii używa symboli władzy królewskiej jedynie podczas sprawowania władzy, jest to także historia najbardziej widocznego znaku godności królewskiej, legitymizacji, kiedy te imponujące klejnoty noszone są na bankietach i wizytach państwowych. Ale niewielu wie, że niektóre z najbardziej fascynujących klejnotów na świecie są często powiązane z ważnymi momentami w historii rodziny królewskiej.

programme.title: Joanna d'Arc - Wyzwolicielka Francji
programme.desc: Joanna d'Arc – Wyzwolicielka Francji – Pierwsza kobieta, która przeszła do historii zachodniej cywilizacji. Wierzyła, że ma boską misję i uratowała Francję w mrocznych dniach wojny stuletniej. Dziewczyna z ludu, która przeciwstawiła się wszystkim instytucjom swoich czasów.

programme.title: Kobiety, które tworzyły historię - Katarzyna - caryca Rosji
programme.desc: Katarzyna została koronowana na carycę Rosji na Kremlu i rządziła krajem przez 34 lata. Jej osiągnięcia sprawiły, że została uznana za Katarzynę Wielką - jedyną rządzącą, która przeszła do historii jako "Wielka".

programme.title: Letizia - Królowa Hiszpanii
programme.desc: Hiszpanie poznali Letizię jako prezenterkę głównego programu informacyjnego. Małżeństwo z Felipe z Hiszpanii zapoczątkowało dla niej zupełnie inne życie. Dla byłego wybitnego dziennikarza sama reprezentacja nie wystarczy. Letizia chce być królową XXI wieku, z wymaganiami zawodowymi i własną pozycją. Zdrowie, żywienie, edukacja i prawa kobiet to zagadnienia, w które jest głęboko zaangażowana, wyraźnie pokazując swoje stanowisko. Spotkania, wyjazdy, przemówienia – wszystko przygotowywane jest z precyzją przy własnym stole. Pierwszy dokument o nowej królowej Hiszpanii.

programme.title: Kobiety, które tworzyły historię - Elżbieta I - Poślubiona Anglii
programme.desc: W epoce zdominowanej przez mężczyzn królowa Elżbieta I była jedyną kobietą. Rządziła Anglią przez 45 lat, kładąc podwaliny pod Imperium Brytyjskie, a kiedy zmarła w 1603 roku, nadała imię całej epoce: epoce elżbietańskiej.

programme.title: Królowa Elżbieta II
programme.desc: Królowa Elżbieta II jest najdłużej panującym monarchą w historii Wielkiej Brytanii i Wspólnoty Narodów. Jej służba dla kraju jest legendarna, a ona stała się globalną postacią siły, wytrzymałości i godności, z którą wszyscy się łączymy. Przeżyj triumfy, porażki, skandale i uroczystości i dowiedz się, jak młoda księżniczka stała się królową dla całego świata.

programme.title: Książe Harry - Ten Drugi
programme.desc: Jeśli Pałac myślał, że rok 2023 będzie spokojniejszy po dramacie i tragedii z 2022 roku, to wydanie autobiografii księcia Harry'ego Spare prawie zniszczyło wszelkie nadzieje. Książka wywołała międzynarodowy szał wśród mediów i opinii publicznej. Opinia jest teraz bardziej podzielona niż kiedykolwiek na temat tego, czy książę Harry powinien zachować swoje królewskie tytuły. Chociaż Harry i Meghan uciekli z rodziny królewskiej, aby mieć drugą szansę na prywatne życie, którego zawsze pragnęli, świat nie pozwolił im odejść po cichu. Pomimo ich ucieczki, ciągła uwaga mediów spowodowała lawinę nagłówków, rozpalając plotki po skandalicznych plotkach na temat pary i rodziny królewskiej. Aby...

programme.title: Królowa Danii - Prywatne życie
programme.desc: Królowa Małgorzata obchodziła swoje 80. urodziny w 2020 roku - to doskonała okazja, aby przyjrzeć się bardziej nieformalnej stronie Jej Królewskiej Mości i dowiedzieć się więcej o jej zainteresowaniach sztuką, kulturą i historią.

programme.title: Królewska historia miłosna - Elżbieta i Jerzy
programme.desc: Historia króla Jerzego VI i królowej Elżbiety, Matki Królowej, to opowieść o miłości, wsparciu i obowiązku. Razem zapewniali stabilność i ciągłość brytyjskiej monarchii w czasie II wojny światowej i później.

programme.title: Matylda Królowa Belgów
programme.desc: Badana psycholog jest figurą w dziedzinie zdrowia psychicznego i opieki nad dziećmi. Z Pałacu Królewskiego matka czwórki dzieci podjęła walkę z cyberprzemocą. "To jest nie do przyjęcia" to przesłanie Mathilde. Jako rzeczniczka Celów Zrównoważonego Rozwoju ONZ jest częścią globalnego ruchu. Dokument pokazuje kobietę, która jest blisko ludzi i która chce coś zmienić na świecie. Królowa z napiętym harmonogramem, która mimo to znalazła czas na ekskluzywne filmowanie.

programme.title: Przyszłe królowe Europy
programme.desc: Przyszłe królowe Europy – kim są młode następczynie tronów, które już wkrótce obejmą władzę? Ten dokument przedstawia sześć wyjątkowych księżniczek: księżniczkę Wiktorię i Estelle ze Szwecji, Ingrid Alexandrę z Norwegii, Amalię z Holandii, Leonorę z Hiszpanii oraz Elżbietę z Belgii.

programme.title: Król Karol III: Nowa Era
programme.desc: Królowa Elżbieta II nie żyje. Zachodzi słońce nad drugą wielką erą Elżbiety. Książę Walii wstępuje na tron i zostaje królem Karolem III. Nastała nowa era; panuje nowoczesna monarchia. W nigdy wcześniej nie widzianym wywiadzie, były kamerdyner króla Karola, Grant Harrold, obecnie sensacja mediów społecznościowych, maluje intymny portret nowego monarchy, dając wgląd w człowieka, który zostanie koronowany na króla w pierwszej koronacji od 70 lat. W wywiadzie z redaktorem naczelnym Majesty Magazine i płodnym królewskim biografem, Ingrid Seward opisuje poruszające momenty odejścia królowej, będąc świadkiem z pierwszej ręki niektórych z najbardziej historycznych momentów w najnowszej historii...

programme.title: Ślub Harry'ego i Meghan
programme.desc: Zawiera pierwszy pełny publiczny wywiad pary, który odbył się 27 listopada 2017 r., a także referencje i wywiady od osób, które znają ich najlepiej. Dołącz do nas, gdy będziemy świętować zaręczyny Harry'ego i Meghan.

programme.title: Maxima Królowa Niderlandów
programme.desc: Praca wydaje się być szyta na miarę dla Máximy. Pierwsza Dama Holandii i Specjalna Rzecznik Sekretarza Generalnego ONZ ds. „Inkluzywnego finansowania rozwoju”. Jako ekonomistka pracuje nad zapewnieniem biednym ludziom dostępu do usług finansowych, lepszej ochrony konsumentów i większej edukacji finansowej. Spotyka się z wpływowymi osobistościami ze świata polityki i biznesu, aby posunąć tę kwestię do przodu. Jego harmonogram jest ściśle określony, nie ma dwóch takich samych dni. Wyzwanie dla mamy trójki dzieci.

programme.title: Następca Tronu Danii
programme.desc: Co to znaczy dorastać ze świadomością, że nigdy nie będzie się w stanie wybrać własnej kariery? Jak zdefiniować siebie w świecie, który ma już krystalicznie czysty obraz tego, kim jesteś i kim będziesz?

programme.title: Pajęcza Sieć - Drugie Imperium Brytyjskie
programme.desc: Jak Wielka Brytania przekształciła się z największego imperium kolonialnego w nowoczesną potęgę finansową.

programme.title: Chińska Autostrada Handlowa
programme.desc: Dokument w wersji z polskim lektorem. Inicjatywa Pasa i Drogi to sieć handlowa pomiędzy Azją, Europą i Afryką. Ponad 70 krajów jest obecnie częścią tej sieci. Inicjatywa Pasa i Drogi jest uważana za centralny punkt polityki zagranicznej sekretarza generalnego Komunistycznej Partii Chin Xi Jinpinga. Chiński rząd nazywa inicjatywę "próbą poprawy regionalnej łączności i dążenia do lepszej przyszłości." Niektórzy obserwatorzy widzą w niej plan chińskiej dominacji na świecie poprzez skoncentrowaną na Chinach globalną sieć handlową. Projekt ma zostać ukończony do 2049 roku, co zbiega się z setną rocznicą powstania Chińskiej Republiki Ludowej.

programme.title: Gospodarka Chin i Cyfrowe Pieniądze
programme.desc: Chiny ogłaszają wszystkie transakcje kryptowalutowe za nielegalne.

programme.title: Jak Naprawić Firmę
programme.desc: Wiele firm przeszło przez długą fazę badań i testowania swoich produktów. Inwestorzy potrzebowali dużej siły przebicia, a ich modele biznesowe były narażone na gwałtowne wstrząsy na rynku. W tym filmie dokumentalnym przyjrzymy się bliżej niektórym z tych firm i ich drodze do sukcesu. Wiele z nich miało trudną drogę do osiągnięcia rentowności lub odzyskania konkurencyjności.

programme.title: Gospodarka Wschodu
programme.desc: Codziennie pojawiają się nowości z Doliny Krzemowej. Wiele naszych technologii pochodzi z "Think Tanks" świata zachodniego. Ale na Wschodzie także pojawiają się innowacje i postęp technologiczny. Czy to podróże kosmiczne w Rosji, czy pionierzy robotyki w Japonii, wszyscy oni próbują zdobyć innowacyjną przewagę konkurencyjną. Wybierz się z nami w podróż po gospodarczym Wschodzie.

programme.title: Gospodarka w Fazie Przejściowej
programme.desc: Przyszłość jest niepewna i pełna wyzwań. Jak ratować nasze miasta i zwalczać nierówności? Jak poradzimy sobie ze starzejącym się społeczeństwem? Jak poradzić sobie z nierównością płac? Nadszedł czas na myślenie o przyszłości.

programme.title: Gospodarka Północy
programme.desc: Co mają wspólnego Szwecja, Kanada i Islandia? Zgadza się, są położone wysoko na północy, gdzie panuje śnieg i jest zimno. Ale właśnie ten ekstremalny klimat dał początek całej gamie technologii i innowacyjnych pomysłów, bez których kraje takie jak Islandia i Szwecja nie byłyby konkurencyjne. Wybierz się z nami w podróż po gospodarce Północy.

programme.title: Ekonomia Południa
programme.desc: Australia, Nowa Zelandia i Chile strasznie słabo radzą sobie z technologią. Przez lata utalentowani programiści tych krajów uciekali do Doliny Krzemowej w USA, by tam zarabiać na życie. Ostatnie programy rządów Australii, Nowej Zelandii i Chile niedofinansowywały nauki i technologii. Istnieją jednak przesłanki by sądzić, że kraje te zaczęły zatrzymywać niektóre z rodzimych talentów technologicznych.

programme.title: Gospodarka Zachodu
programme.desc: Na zachodzie znajdziemy jednych z największych lub przynajmniej najbardziej ekscentrycznych wynalazców świata. To rzemiosło jest seksowną bestią popychającą maszyny do granic możliwości. Jeśli spojrzeć na pustynię Mojave w USA lub Wielką Brytanię z czasów drugiej wojny światowej, to są to miejsca, które pławią się w inżynierskiej pasji i oferują wolność niestrudzonym majsterkowiczom.

programme.title: Zagrożenia Sztucznej Inteligencji
programme.desc: Analiza alternatywnego sposobu dokładnego badania opinii politycznych za pomocą programu sztucznej inteligencji o nazwie Polly.

programme.title: Niechybny Koniec. Jak pieniądze straciły swoją wartość.
programme.desc: Wall Street jest okupowana. Europa wali się na siebie. Na całym świecie ludzie są ogarnięci strachem i gniewem, a jedno pytanie jest na ustach wszystkich: Czy kryzys finansowy się skończył, czy też zmierzamy w kierunku gospodarczej katastrofy? End of the Road to film dokumentalny, który jest kroniką globalnego krachu finansowego.

programme.title: Legendy Internetu
programme.desc: W tym dokumencie opowiadamy historie założycieli największych firm internetowych.

programme.title: Żyjąc Przeszłością Przyszłości
programme.desc: Ten film podważa nasz sposób myślenia i zapewnia oryginalny wgląd w nasze podświadome motywacje, niezamierzone konsekwencje i sposób, w jaki nasza podstawowa natura wpływa na naszą przyszłość jako ludzkości.

programme.title: Mafia, Kokaina i Białe Kołnierzyki
programme.desc: Jest kokaina, tony kokainy, jeden z najbogatszych i najważniejszych szefów Ndranghety w Europie i tak zwana szwajcarska pralka. Ten raport śledzi przepływ brudnych pieniędzy od dealerów w Ameryce Południowej i oferuje niepokojące okno na życie „pracowników umysłowych” w Ticino

programme.title: ASEAN Następne Pokolenie
programme.desc: 10 krajów, 640 milionów ludzi, łączna gospodarka tak duża jak Indie. ASEAN przygotowuje się na kolejne pokolenie.

programme.desc: Did you know that dinosaurs love to sing and dance?

programme.title: Bebefinn Bora's Rainbow Unicorn
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Bebefinn Bora's Rainbow Unicorn
programme.desc: Bora LOVES unicorn with rainbow colors! Let's talk together the uniqueness of unicorns over the rainbow

programme.title: Welcome to the Coral Reef
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Welcome to the Coral Reef
programme.desc: Welcome to the Coral Reef! Make new friends and enjoy fun rides together. But remember—when playing with others, always follow the important playground rules!

programme.title: Bebefinn I Spy Song
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Bebefinn I Spy Song
programme.desc: Let’s find red things! Bebefinn, Bora, and Brody are playing a color-finding game. Learn this easy color search game you can play at home!

programme.title: Cute Puppy Songs and Crafts
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Cute Puppy Songs and Crafts
programme.desc: I’m so happy, happy with my puppy friend! Let’s make our special puppy friend today. While we play with colorful crafts, Woof! A cute puppy appears!

programme.title: Bebefinn
programme.desc: Baby Finn Learns Something New Everyday with the Funn Family! Here comes another beautiful precious day of Finn, a Baby Shark lover just as our children, and his Family. Enjoy the daily life of the Bebefinn Family filled with joyful songs.

programme.title: Pinkfong Chart Show
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Zoom zoom Super Speed Kings
programme.desc: Wow! All the friends who want to meet the speed king friends, gather! What is the fastest animal in the world? What is the fastest planet? Meet the friends who run fast with Pinkfong!

programme.title: Dance with Pinkfong
programme.desc: You are watching "Dance with Pinkfong!", a super fun nursery rhyme created by Pinkfong. Everybody! Let's sing with Pinkfong.

programme.title: Storytime with Pinkfong and Animal Friends
programme.desc: Shall we go out to meet our fun animal friends in the woods? Fun animal friends are waiting for us, including a pig with a cute twisty tail, a detective squirrel looking for acorns, and a rhinoceros jumping around! Let's all start together!

programme.title: Bebefinn
programme.desc: Baby Finn Learns Something New Everyday with the Funn Family! Here comes another beautiful precious day of Finn, a Baby Shark lover just as our children, and his Family. Enjoy the daily life of the Bebefinn Family filled with joyful songs.

programme.title: Pinkfong Best Car Songs
programme.desc: Meet car friends and learn about the vehicles.

programme.title: Baby Shark Workout
programme.desc: Move your body and exercise with your favorite Baby Shark Songs!

programme.title: Baby Shark Brooklyn
programme.desc: Baby Shark Brooklyn's adventure under the sea! 5. A Race to the Finish 6. The Case of the Ghost on 94th

programme.title: Baby Shark Brooklyn
programme.desc: Baby Shark Brooklyn's adventure under the sea! 11. Coral Forest Rescue! 12. Bella's Surprise Village Concert

programme.title: Baby Shark Boulevard
programme.desc: Baby Shark, the beloved global star, is on the move! To meet fans from all around the world, Baby Shark is setting out on an exciting journey. Join the adventure and meet Baby Shark!

programme.desc: Baby Shark, the beloved global star, is on the move! To meet fans from all around the world, Baby Shark is setting out on an exciting journey. Join the adventure and meet Baby Shark!

programme.title: Happy Birthday to 100 Friends
programme.desc: It’s birthday time! All birthday friends, gather around! Bebefinn, Bora, and Brody are here to celebrate each and every one of you!

programme.title: Baby Shark Color Songs
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Baby Shark Color Songs
programme.desc: We are the Shark Family! Full of colors, Shark Family! Dance along and match what color each family member!

programme.title: Pinkfong Colors Halloween
programme.desc: Learn Halloween special colors with Pinkfong and Wonderstars friends!

programme.title: Super Solver Sammy
programme.desc: There is always Sammy next to Pinkfong and friends, where incidents and accidents never cease. But... the solving process is a mess!? Well, anyway, the clumsy problem solver Sammy gets things done!

programme.title: Baby Shark Special Song
programme.desc: Doo doo doo doo doo doo! For all fans who love our Baby Shark songs, here we are with baby shark songs compilation. Everybody, Let's go and have some fun!

programme.desc: Learn all about healthy habits with Baby Shark and Pinkfong!

programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Bebefinn Happy New Year Songs
programme.desc: Bebefinn Family reflects on a joyful year together through an album. Let’s create even more beautiful moments with Bebefinn Family this New Year!

programme.title: Baby Shark Without Mommy
programme.desc: Shhh! Ready? Baby Shark and Daddy Shark plan to snack while Mommy sleeps. Can they eat cookies without her noticing?

programme.title: Happy Baby Shark Month
programme.desc: Baby Shark Month is back! Le'ts celebrate Baby Shark Month by singing along with a baby shark!

programme.title: Rwar! The Dinos Are Sick
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Rwar! The Dinos Are Sick
programme.desc: Roar! Treat us right away, Doctor Baby Shark! Oh no, it looks like the dinosaurs are sick. Doctor Baby Shark will swiftly treat them. Now, please come into the clinic~

programme.title: Ninimo is Sick
programme.desc: Ninimo has caught a cold! Become a doctor with Hogi and Forest to treat sick Ninimo!

programme.desc: Every alphabet makes different sounds. Kids will easily be friends with ABCs with a fun alphabet dance along series.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: Crate to Plate
programme.desc: Documentary series that follows the amazing journey of an ingredient from its originating source to its final destination.

programme.title: Crate to Plate
programme.desc: Millions of pounds of cranberries start their global journey from a Nova Scotia farm. Watch one batch make their way from field to Thanksgiving feast.

programme.title: Crate to Plate
programme.desc: From the cool clear blue waters of Vancouver to a beachside grill, watch the harrowing journey of a highly sought-after spot prawn.

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Vietnam, Lebanon, China, Germany
programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by Vietnam - Vietnamese Green Beans, Lebanon - Watermelon Tabbouleh, China - Signapore-Style Spaghetti Squash Noodles, and Germany - Celeriac Sauerbraten and Slaw!

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Italy, Morocco, Ethiopia, Jamaica
programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by Italy - Roasted Radishes and Radish Pesto, Morocco - Moroccan Spiced Apples, Ethiopia - Ethiopian Spinach Dip, and Jamaica - Jerk Shiitakes with Coconut Rice!

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Korea, Russia, Spain, El Salvador
programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by South Korea - Jicama Kimchi, Russia - Roasted Eggplant Salad, Spain - Quinoa Paella, and El Salvador - Salvadorian Grilled Iceberg Lettuce Wedge!

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Indonesia, Greece, Syria, Thailand
programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by Indonesia - Tomato Nasi Goreng, Greece - Greek Melon Salad, Syria - Kidney Bean Hummus, and Thailand - Coconut Curry Cabbage Rolls!

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.desc: Smiling host Vanessa Gianfrancesco loves Bread for Brunch and so will you! In this episode she shares mouthwatering mid-morning bread recipes.

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.desc: Charming host Vanessa is your host for this Dim Sum episode -- try your hand at dumplings, congee and more!

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Brunch Around The World
programme.desc: Fun host Vanessa answers the question "Where should I cook for brunch today?" Join her for Brunch Around The World!

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.desc: What do they eat for brunch in the Middle East? Friendly host Vanessa is excited to show you with these tasty recipes!

programme.title: Crate to Plate
programme.desc: In the stark ruins of a remote forest fire, morel mushrooms sprout in the ashes. Watch their journey across thousands of miles from forest to feast.

programme.desc: Millions of pounds of cranberries start their global journey from a Nova Scotia farm. Watch one batch make their way from field to Thanksgiving feast.

programme.title: Crate to Plate
programme.desc: From the cool clear blue waters of Vancouver to a beachside grill, watch the harrowing journey of a highly sought-after spot prawn.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Sweden, Mexico, Senegal, Italy
programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by Sweden - Swedish Turnips and Granola, Mexico - Radicchio Tacos, Senegal - Cashew-Sweeth Potato Maafe, and Italy - Bok Choy Fusili!

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 South Africa, Iceland, Bangladesh, Spain
programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by South Africa - Braaied Rapini, Iceland - Cold Icelandic Pepper Soup, Bangladesh - Edamame Jhalmuri, and Spain - Spanish Broccoli Tortilla!

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 India, Belgium, Italy, China
programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by India - Bhindi Masala-Style Nopales, Belgium - Belgian Plantain Waffles, Italy - Almond Crusted Portobellos, and China - Sichuan Artichoke Stir Fry!

programme.title: Global Veggies
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 USA, Vietnam, Spain, India
programme.desc: Join chef Pino Di Cerbo in the Global Veggies kitchen as he creates veggie dishes inspired by the USA - Scalloped Cassava Casserole, Vietnam - Pear Summer Rolls, Spain - Hempseed Romesco with Leeks, and India - Potato Biryani Hash!

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.desc: You won't want to miss the ever personable Vanessa's sumptuous seafood snacks on this episode of Let's Brunch!

programme.title: Let's Brunch
programme.desc: Looking for a brunch that gets past the usual old 'eggs and bacon' rut? Check out Vanessa's amazing Vegan Brunch ideas!

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Meet Iafa Almeida Cac
programme.desc: Host Tyrone Edwards reveals to Brazil-born Iafa Almeida Cac that she has roots from other places. Alongside an expert chef, Iafa cooks a recipe that blends fresh ingredients from her Brazilian and newfound culture.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: The Italian region Campania is known for its seafood and pizza. Famed Chef Michael Bonacini prepares classics like Margherita Pizza and Fried Seafood.

programme.title: Bonacini's Italy
programme.desc: Pasta, bread, pizza dough! Host Michael Bonacini makes Apulian classics like Artichoke Cheese Panzerotti.

programme.title: Spice Secrets
programme.desc: From Fettuccine Alfredo to Meatloaf, everyday recipes are enjoyed every day for a reason: we love them! Chefs Shahir Massoud and Jasmin Ibrahim use spices to punch up these classic recipes. Meatloaf gets aromatic allspice, and is topped with bay leaf spiked ketchup. Fettuccine gets mustard; both the seed and the leafy green! Bacon and fried rice are ultimate comfort foods, but have you ever tried it with cardamom in the mix? Spice is the secret, a pinch of spice can make a world of difference!

programme.title: Feed My Soul, V!
programme.desc: Vanessa and Stefania take a delicious trip down memory lane with a menu of meaningful dishes and a table to match! There’s Tuscan beans, gnocchi with a duo of sauces, short rib braciole, chocolate semifreddo, and so much more!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 It's All About the Olive Oil
programme.desc: The greatest staple of Italian cuisine? Olive oil! Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco uses olive oil to make delightful Italian dishes.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.desc: Fish loves spice and Chef Spencer Watts loves fish so he brings the delicious world of spice to halibut and lobster along with some cooling sides.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts shares some of his favorite mackerel and mussel recipes that highlight aromatic, vibrant and fresh herbs.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.desc: Sturgeon and prawns meet wines and liqueurs in Chef Spencer Watts' kitchen as he brings seafood and booze together in delicious culinary concoctions.

programme.title: Fish the Dish
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts dishes on delicious ways to stuff rainbow trout and oysters and how to use them to stuff in a sandwich or even an avocado parcel.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S02 : E14 DIY Italian Fine Dining
programme.desc: Italian chef and foodie Vanessa Gianfrancesco shows us how to make dishes delicious enough for a fine restaurant with fried zucchini blossoms, spaghetti carbonara, roast lamb, and fruit crostata.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S02 : E17 Japanese food inspired by other cultures
programme.desc: Chef and culinary instructor Hana Etsuko Dethlefsen shows us Japanese cuisine inspired by other cultures with a pork and tofu dish, sesame chicken salad, breaded pork cutlet, and even a French crepe.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 Northern Cuisine: Chiang Mai
programme.desc: Thai chef Pailin Chongchitnant explores the cuisine of Northern Thai city Chiang Mai with red chili pork dip, minced pork salad, Thai-style chicken noodle soup, and Burmese-style curry.

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make hamburgers with sides and dessert for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: smash burgers, pickle slaw, matchstick fries, and strawberry chocolate milkshakes!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a fresh meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: lamb lettuce wraps, asparagus soup with dill, and apricot turnovers!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a rainy day meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: Shepherd’s pie, crispy green beans, and no bake chai cheesecake!

programme.desc: Dermot needs to create "a bungalow downstairs" incorporating a bedroom, bathroom, kitchen, living and dining room.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot wants to turn the house completely on its head, putting the bedrooms to the front and extending the back to include a kitchen, living and dining that leads into the garden.

programme.desc: Dermot is in Laytown, co.Meath, with a budget of 60,000 euros, Dermot's worry "is even if you took away the shoddy workmanship you'd spend the 60k, this is a really difficult one..."

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.title: Great World Hotels

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland

programme.title: Backpack Serbia

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: With snow-capped peaks rising over primeval forests and traditional villages, Paro is like an Oriental Switzerland. On a visit to Paro, Radhika explores famous monasteries such as the Rinpung Dzong and Takstang Monastery, and learns the history and legends associated with them. Along the way, she finds out the secrets to the quintessential Bhutanese peace and contentment.

programme.title: Great World Hotels

programme.title: Boarding Pass

programme.desc: Emeline goes to Ruka-Kuusamo, where she tries river rafting. She also meets a reindeer herder,who tells her about the unique ways of herding reindeer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Actress and travel enthusiast, Radhika Bangia explores the enigma that is Bhutan, when she visits Thimpu, the capital city with no traffic lights and no skyscrapers invading the skyline. Here, she checks out significant sights such as the Tibetan-style National Memorial Chorten, the National Library and the Folk Heritage Museum in order to understand more about the beliefs, history, architecture and cuisine of Bhutan.

programme.title: World Heritage

programme.desc: Explore the ancient heritage sites of Abu Simbel, the Philae complex of Nubia and the Hatshepsut Temple to unravel the mystical stories behind the ancient temples of Egypt.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Known as Druk Yul or the “Land of the Thunder Dragon”, Bhutan is the country of mountains, monasteries and mystery. Radhika Bangia finds this to be true when she visits Punakha, the former capital of Bhutan, where she marvels at the architecture of Punakha Dzong and gets to know the story behind the two rivers, Mo Chhu and Po Chhu. She also explores the sacred temples and Mebar Tsho lake of Bumthang, the religious heart of Bhutan, and gets to know the local legends.

programme.title: World Spas

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

programme.desc: You want to feel like a race driver? The British car manufacture Radical can make your dreams come true.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Those living outside United States need to import cars the likes of Corvette C7 and Ford Mustang.

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: A look at some of the most extreme specimens in the offroad world: a Fiat Panda monster truck, a Ford Raptor, a Mercedes G-Class conversion, a modified Volkswagen Touareg, a Jeep Grand Cherokee SRT8 and the Fiat Panda Cross.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Examine how Asian car design has evolved over the years; at Lexus, the luxury vehicle division of Toyota, the trend is toward angular shapes and aggressive appearance.

programme.title: 4x4

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: The Jaguar XF-S is supposed to put pressure on BMW, Audi and co. in the business class segment; it brings V6 power, 380 HP output and all-wheel drive.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: By selling and assembling accessories for Jeep, ORZ Vehicles makes the American off-road dream come true for European customers.

programme.title: Historic Formula V
programme.desc: In the late 1950s in America, the first Formula V racers were produced. These small cars were seen on tracks until the end of the 1970s, but their heritage would live on through an association known as Historic Formula V Europe.

programme.title: Classic Races

programme.title: Classic Races

programme.desc: The 2023 Freeride World Tour kicks off in January in its 16th season – as usual with the best freeriders all over the globe! The first stop of the tour takes place in Baqueira Beret.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.desc: Today we accompany German highliner Lukas Irmler and his friends on their expedition into one of the deepest caves in the world - and experience how they cross the lowest slackline ever!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 A Song for Tomorrow
programme.desc: This April, Mayan Smith-Gobat and Ben Rueck joined China's renowned mountaineers Liu Yongbang (Abond) and Xiao Ting on an expedition to explore the Qingfeng Valley on the border of Zhangjiajie, China's first and largest national park.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 WOF 2024 #10: Reconnect Two - USA
programme.desc: Today we continue our North American Odyssey with Sarka Pancochova and Cheryl Maas in Reconnect Two. From Mt Baker and the legendary Bank Slalom to backcountry kickers in Bend get ready for the full Pacific Northwest snowboard experience.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 5 Peaks in One Day - Mountaineering
programme.desc: Zermatt, Switzerland - Swiss alpinist Andreas Steindl (26) has accomplished what most people deem impossible: he ran 30.66 kilometres from Zermatt to Saas Fee crossing five 4000m peaks. in only 7 hours, 45 minutes and 44 seconds.

programme.title: Open Faces 2025 - YETI Freeride Junior World Championships Kappl/Paznaun - LIVE Part 2
programme.desc: Open Faces 2025 - YETI Freeride Junior World Championships Kappl/Paznaun - LIVE Part 2

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 WOF 2023 #06: Qatar Airways GKA Freestyle-Kite World Cup 2022 - Taiba (BRA)
programme.desc: Die letzte Runde der Freestyle-Disziplin auf der Qatar Airways GKA Kite World Tour beginnt am Dienstag, 8. November. Beim Freestyle-Kite World Cup Taiba messen sich die besten Freestyle-Kiter der Welt bei perfekten Bedingungen auf der berüchtigten Lagune.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 WOF 2023 #31: European Freestyle Pro Tour 2023 - Mid Season Recap
programme.desc: Die ersten Events der European Freestyle Pro Tour 2023 sind vorbei und wir werfen einen Blick zurück auf die besten Windsurfer der Welt und ihre epischen Tricks auf dem Wasser.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E41 WOF 2023 #41: Vanora ENGADINWIND by Dakine 2023
programme.desc: Der VANORA ENGADINWIND by Dakine kehrt 2023 mit viel spannender Windsurf-Action auf dem Silvaplanasee in der Schweiz zurück. Der ENGADINWIND ist auch Gastgeber der ersten iQ FOiL U21 Weltmeisterschaft, die für das olympische Programm in Paris 2024 ausgewählt wurde.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 WOF 2025 #20: ABSA Cape Epic Series - Episode 2
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is known as one of the toughest mountain bike stage races in the world and pushes riders to their physical and mental limits. The first three stages set the tone for the entire race.

programme.title: Desert Dash Namibia 2024
programme.desc: The Desert Dash 2024 is an exhilarating mountain biking event that challenges riders to conquer the breathtaking terrain of the Namib Desert. Spanning over 24 hours, participants embark on a grueling 369-kilometer journey.

programme.title: Cape Epic 2025
programme.desc: The Cape Epic 2025 is one of the world's most important mountain bike stage races in the rugged landscape of South Africa. The event promises intense competition and unforgettable adventures

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 FAI World Drone Racing Championship Grand Final - Ningbo (CHN)
programme.desc: The elite of drone racing take on the challenge on the 630m race track with 14 different types of obstacles and 25 flags to qualify for the finals and secure a share of the total prize money of $125,000.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 WOF 2025 #22: Swatch Nines – Skate & Surf
programme.desc: The show offers an exciting insight into the first Swatch Nines event, which took place in October 2024 in Waco Surf, Texas. The three-day event emphasized creativity and collaboration over rankings and scores.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Go Big or Go Home - Freestyle Kayak
programme.desc: Go big or go home - in search of the perfect waveadidas Outdoorsportsteam: Nick Troutman, Mat Dumoulin, Gerd Serrasolses & Peter CsonkaNo distance is too great for these four athletes - their quest takes them and their kayaks from Africa to North America.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Mammut Biggest Peak Project 1
programme.desc: Anniversary base camp / Jungfraujoch (Switzerland)On 3 August 2011, exactly 200 years after the first ascent, the Swiss mountain sports outfitter Mammut will be organizing the biggest summit project in the history of mountaineering on the “Top of Europe”...

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Biggest Peak Project in History - Part III (Cerro Kishtwar)
programme.desc: Mammut 150 Peaks Project: Cerro KishtwarKashmir, India, holds some of the world’s most spectacular and mystical mountains. Now with special permissions, an European team will attempt to climb the most aesthetic one of all, Cerro Kishtwar.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.desc: If one knows in the West above all Iranian moral rigour and war rhetoric, the enduro professionals Anita and Caro Gehrig experience open people, hospitality, great interest in the West and last but not least unconditional passion for mountain biking.

programme.title: World Downhill Skateboarding Championship - Season Review - Women's Skate & Luge + Open Street Luge: 27min-HL
programme.desc: The 2025 World Downhill Skateboarding Championships season review recaps the global series held across locations including USA, UK, and Turkey. The season blends high-adrenaline competition with grassroots engagement, promoting downhill skateboarding worldwide

programme.title: World Downhill Skateboarding Championships Round 1 - Axamer Lizum (AUT)
programme.desc: The Downhill Skateboarding World Championships in Axamer Lizum, Austria, kicked off the 2025 season from June 13 to 15. The course on the steep and technically demanding 3.3 km Hoadlstraße featured tight hairpin turns, long straights, and gradients of up to 21.8%, providing ideal conditions for high-speed racing and overtaking maneuvers.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E41 Golden Fly Series 2022 - Schaan (LIE)
programme.desc: On September 11th, the world’s best long jumpers and pole vaulters took once again flight on a certified mobile athletics facility that enables the athletes to use the same runway.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 WOF 2025 #06: Queen & King of the Court Finals 2024
programme.desc: The stage is set for the 2024 Queen & King of the Court Crown Series Finals in Qatar! The best beach volleyball players will compete against each other in the Aspire Zone. From December 12-14, the best athletes in the world will battle it out for the title.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Womens Climbing Part 1 - Female Climbing Heroes - Indoor Bouldering
programme.desc: Year after year, new climbing gyms are built on all continents. The discipline of bouldering, which is unroped climbing above padded mats, primarily enjoys an increase in popularity, most notably among girls and young women.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Womens Climbing Part 2 - Female Climbing Heroes - Outdoor Bouldering
programme.desc: The Forêt de Fontainebleau in France is the largest and most developed bouldering area in the world and home to one of France's most famous climbers - Mélissa Le Nevé, who was the first woman to climb the technical difficulty level 8B+

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 WOF 2024 #05: Reconnect One - USA
programme.desc: Sarka and Cheryl, who haven't seen each other in years, have decided to reunite and embark on a tour of their own. Having once traveled together on the contest scene for over 15 years, life led them to different corners of the West Coast of America.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.desc: The 2018 Cape Epic takes riders through 658km through South Africa's Western Cape countryside and up many hills: the total elevation gain will be 13,530m. The race attracts professional and serious amateur participants from around the world.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 WOF 2026 #05: Queen & King of the Court
programme.desc: Queen & King of the Court went to London for a historic edition at the Crystal Palace National Sports Centre. Followed by another indoor event Queen & King of the Court travelled north to Hesinki, Finland.

programme.title: SFT E-Foil & Wake Foil World Cups Abu Dhabi 2025- 26min-HL
programme.desc: The SFT Surf Foil World Tour will stage its SFT Wake Foil and E-Foil World Cups for the first time in the Middle East at the Fahid Island Watersports Festival. The final stop of the 2025 SFT E-Foil season will decide the world tour title.

programme.title: Nedbank Gravel Burn 2025 - Western & Eastern Cape (RSA)
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Nedbank Gravel Burn 2025 - Western & Eastern Cape (RSA) Stage 3
programme.desc: Nedbank Gravel Burn is a 7-day, 800km full-service gravel stage race through South Africa’s diverse landscapes. Starting in coastal forests, the route heads into the breathtaking Great Karoo - a vast, spectacular semi-desert region

programme.title: Nedbank Gravel Burn 2025 - Western & Eastern Cape (RSA)
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Nedbank Gravel Burn 2025 - Western & Eastern Cape (RSA) Stage 4
programme.desc: Nedbank Gravel Burn is a 7-day, 800km full-service gravel stage race through South Africa’s diverse landscapes. Starting in coastal forests, the route heads into the breathtaking Great Karoo - a vast, spectacular semi-desert region

programme.title: Simple Session 2025 - Skate Finals MEN
programme.desc: Simple Session is back at Unibet Arena in Tallinn, Estonia – celebrating its massive 25-year anniversary! A quarter-century of mind-blowing BMX riding and skateboarding, unforgettable moments, and a global community of athletes pushing the limits.Hoppla!

programme.title: Open Faces 2025 - FWQ Challenger Silvretta Montafon - Live delayed Part 2
programme.desc: For the first time, Silvretta Montafon will be part of the Freeride World Tour Challenger Series, making it a crucial contest for the world's best qualifier riders who want to qualify for the Freeride World Tour 2026.

programme.title: Vendée Globe 2024 - 52min HL (Sailing, Mitte Februar) – International + DACH
programme.desc: The Vendée Globe wants to use the media impact of the event to raise public awareness of ocean protection during the circumnavigation. By sailing around the world, the Vendée Globe sailors are drawing attention to the fragility of our oceans.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 15, Malaysia (World Finals Part 1)
programme.desc: Taking place over 2 days in Malaysia, this is part 1 of the world finals of Strongman Champions League!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 16, Malaysia (World Finals Part 2)
programme.desc: Who will be the winner of Strongman Champions League - we find out who is crowned as world champion today in the second part of the final epsiode

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 1, Norway
programme.desc: Across seven rivers, through mountains and forests, 12 strongmen go to toughest places to find out who is strongest Viking in the World and open a new season of Strongman champions league for 2015. Events like the Hercules Hold, Yoke Race and pulling a real Viking ship are some of the ingredients of this fantastic show.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 2, Germany
programme.desc: The second stage of Strongman champions league will be hosted in Germany, by FIBO - the leading international trade show for fitness, wellness and health worldwide with 300,000 visitors in four days. Special implements like the biggest log in the world or the special Bavarian stone lift are not only a challenge, but also an opportunity for new personal, national and world records.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 3, Holland
programme.desc: Holland is hosting 12 different countries with 14 of the strongest men in the world for the third stage of the Strongman Champions League.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 4, Finland
programme.desc: Zydrunas Savickas, one of strongest people on earth is in this competition which has attracted the attention of the audience in the battle for the title of strongest man in Finland. The next round of SCL is in Bulgaria.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 5, Bulgaria
programme.desc: The next stage of the competition is in Bulgaria where Ervin Katona (SCL World Champion 2012) will compete for the last time.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 6, Latvia
programme.desc: Krzysztof Radzikowski, the leader in the league will fight hard to keep Dainis Zageris off from the title and to gather another 25 ranking points in this next stage in Latvia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 7, Croatia
programme.desc: The competition sees a close battle with a new world record in overhead dumbbell and close finishes throughout the day. This stage is in Croatia, in a city over 1700 years old, steeped in Roman tradition and history, the athletes arrive for the truck pull after a picturesque boat ride on the Adriatic Sea.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 8, Poland
programme.desc: We are now half way through the SCL 2015 and getting closer to the grand world finals in Turkey. The eighth stage is in Poland, the home country of the current leader Krzysztof Radzikowski.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 9, Austria
programme.desc: In this stage we go into the mountains of Austria to find out through six grueling events who is the strongest in the land of Alps. Martin Wildauer, current World Champion 2014 and Austrian local is competing alongside Zageris, Radzikowski, Belsak and many others.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 10, Romania
programme.desc: The 10th stage of this year's competition in Strongman Champions League is held in the Romanian city of Sibiu where the 12 strongmen continue to compete for the title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E11 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 11, World Log Lift Championship
programme.desc: The 11th stage is the SCL Log Lift World Championships in Lithuania. In this championship, each competitor must lift three different weights overhead. Zydrunas Savickas is the current world record holder in the Log Lift.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E12 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 12, Lithuania
programme.desc: This next episode of the Strongman Champions League is hosted in Lithuania and sees us getting one step closer to the final.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E13 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 13, Portugal
programme.desc: The 13th stage of Strongman Champions League is in Maia, Portugal. The competition is at the “Powerexpo” – one of the best sport and fitness events in Portugal.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E14 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 14, Martinique
programme.desc: This stage is in Martinique and eight strongmen from all over the world will compete for the last chance to gather points before the world grand finals in December.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E15 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 15, Lightweight World Championship
programme.desc: A special World championship under the newcomers and lightweights in the Strongman world. Some of them will step from this to the heavyweights divisions.

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: In a showdown between the winners from Series 1 and the powerhouse Russian Red Devils, Mario Rinaldi is in tough against Sergey Kaznovski. Last time, Semenov was battered into submission, so he come into this fight hungry for revenge.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Harley-Davidson add three additions to their model range of bikes: the motorized wheelie bike Sportster 72, the versatile Switchback Dyna, and the bad-boy ride „Softail Slim“. Also: two German bikers take a dusty adventure ride through Mexico on their BMW's. And: the Triumph Speedmaster, the British answer to Harley-Davidson's cruiser.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: At the old-timer grand prix at the Nuerburgring you for example can see the Mercedes S with 160 horsepower that lead Rudolf Caracciola to victory in the 1927 opening race.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: In this episode, we focused on Phoenix Racing, the successful team from the Eifel Region that rocked the DTM.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: In the early 1970s the Porsche Carrera RS was the fastest and most agile production sports car in Germany. Today the RS is a Porsche classic with highest acclaim.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: At the 2014 Saalbach Classic rally 80 teams raced their automobile rarities through the Austrian Alps. In addition: rally legend Walter Röhrl in a Porsche 911 RSR at the Cologne-Ahrweiler rally. And: the infamous Group B vehicle category.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of some of the exciting stunts at Action Concept, the biggest action movie production company in Europe. Also: Johannes and Ferdinand Stuck with the BMW Alpina D5 Twin Turbo at the test track. And: the Volkswagen Up city car.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Following the Porsche 911's anniversary we take a look back at this iconic model's history. Also: the world's first series-produced plug-in hybrid with a diesel engine, the Volvo V60. And: safety measures in the car world, from seatbelts to crash tests.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 BMW X6M vs Nissan Patrol
programme.desc: At Jumeirah Beach in Dubai, car owners can have their souped-up vehicles judged in three categories and win an overnight stay at the Sofitel Hotel. This time, a BMW X6M, a Ford F250 and a Nissan Patrol are in the running.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Mercedes SLS vs Audi R8
programme.desc: Mylene Gomera and Saif Hattawi once again invite the owners of the most extraordinary cars to Dubai, where they award points for speed, style and sound. This time, they will be joined by a limited edition Mercedes SLS and an Audi R8.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E120 When Sports Meets Indulgence
programme.desc: Luxury class grand tourers with four doors. Porsche introduced their Panamera as a Plugin Hybrid or equipped with new turbo engines. BMW responded with their M6 Gran Coupe. German engineering at its finest.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Mc Laren MP4 12C, the Porsche 911 Turbo S and the Mercedes SLS AMG GT are super sports cars that are second to none. We put the pedal to the metal in these exciting and powerful driving machines.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: Christian Menzel asked our presenter Miriam to participate in a driver safety training where he showed tips and tricks on what to do in emergency situations.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: Spring finally melted away the snow on the track and racing life returned to the Nuerburgring. Drivers with gasoline in their veins started chasing their cars around the ring again.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: It's getting hot in this episode of Stunt Heroes. Stuntman Paul will be engulfed by flames as everything around him blows up in this dangerous fire stunt. The Action Concept team carefully prepares for this heated scene.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.sub-title: S02 : E28 Alarm in the gravel pit
programme.desc: The Stunt Heroes turned a gravel quarry into their own stunt playground. This time, a motorbike without a driver flies over a ramp, a catapult for humans is tested and a new rollover punch is tried out in a fight scene.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Chevy Camaro vs Mercedes SLS AMG
programme.desc: Mylene Gomera and Saif Hattawi invite car freaks from the Middle East to show off their souped-up vehicles on the "Walk" at Jumeirah Beach in Dubai. In this episode, a Chevrolet Camaro competes against a Mercedes SLS AMG.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 BMW X5 vs Mercedes SLK 230
programme.desc: If you like souped-up and luxuriously equipped vehicles, Jumeirah Beach in Dubai is the place to be. There, the cars are judged and there is also something to win. This episode features a BMW X5 and a Mercedes SLK 230.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E118 Batman's Dreams: Supercars in Acceleration
programme.desc: The clash of the convertibles, the Nissan 370 Z in comparison to Porsche's Boxster S. Also: the exclusive one-off high-performance sports car Maybach Exelero. And: a dream of a sports car, a vehicle of superlatives, the Bugatti Veyron Vitesse.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Three extraordinarily sporty SUVs are the Porsche Macan Turbo, the Mercedes GLA 45 AMG and the Audi RSQ3. Each of these is able to easily cope with each season of the year and, in regards to performance, could be mistaken for a sports car.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E117 Million-Dollar Toys from the Middle East
programme.desc: The McLaren MP4 12C Spider, one of many high-performance sports cars featured at the Doha Motor Show in Qatar. Also: the creations of manufacturers like Lamborghini, Bertone or Porsche but also the first Arab super sports car, the Lykan HyperSport.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E71 Mobility in Eastern Europe
programme.desc: In the 1950s, companies like Tatra from Czechoslovakia introduced advanced, even pioneering automobiles. The clientele was exclusive, which is why now these streamlined cars are big rarities. We tracked down the owner of a 1937 Tatra T87.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S02 : E31 Women and their Classic Cars
programme.desc: A small group of car enthusiastic ladies offers resistance in the otherwise man dominated classic car world. One of them is Johanna. The 24-year-old loves her 1969 Corvette more than everything.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: We explored how the Z4 Roadster feels as a cabriolet. Also: the small company Boom Trikes Automotive have become Europe's leading trike manufacturer. And: cruising through Los Angeles in a Volkswagen Beetle convertible.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The BMW i8 was one of the first sports cars with some sort of a green image. In addition we took two fly-weight sports cars, the Lotus Elise and the Roding Roadster, to one of the most beautiful alpine pass roads.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Three brothers from the same Volkswagen production platform: the Skoda Kodiaq provides room for seven people, the Volkswagen Tiguan is a bit more expensive but offers a broader range of engines, and Seat infuse the SUV segment with Spanish passion.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: In 2016, the readers of the German "Off Road" magazine once again awarded the Jeep Wrangler as their favourite 4x4. Also: at the "Meet'n'Jeep" Jeep enthusiasts drive their treasures through slush and mud. Also: test driving the Jeep Cherokee.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: The Blacktrail by PG Bikes is the fastest and lightest E-bike in the world, but also the most expensive. What's behind this exciting power package from Regensburg, Germany? Also: is BMW's new flagship bike, the K 1600 GT with 6 cylinders really worth its price and is it able to stand up to the competition by Honda, Kawasaki and Benelli?

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Stunt world champion Chris Pfeiffer test drives the BMW F 800 R and explains why he is rather excited about the performance and handling of this robust and agile roadster. Also: a look behind the scenes of German helmet manufacturer Schuberth Helme's testing and development procedures. And: German actor Jürgen Vogel puts his new Ducati 1198 SP to the test at the Nürburgring.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: McLaren's MP4 12C GT3 is as fast as a Formula One car. We explored how this super sports car came to be. Also: the German company Mechatronik specializes in restoring rare and classic cars like the Mercedes W111.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E74 Supercars of the Frankfurt Motor Show
programme.desc: We took a look at the IAA Frankfurt 2011 highlights, like the new Porsche 911, Mercedes' SLS AMG Roadster, the Bentley Continental Convertible, a 1,100 hp monster from Croatia and others.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: In this episode we invite you to witness the progress of driver Uwe Nittle as he got ready for qualifying at the Truck Grand Prix.

programme.title: Trackmasters
programme.desc: The Nuerburgring shook when the VLN began its second leg of the tournament. We once again accompany you to this exciting competition, including the highlights of BMW's 1st leg win.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E90 Techart Cayenne Turbo Magnum
programme.desc: Techart transforms the Porsche Cayenne Turbo into a real beast with more than 600 hp. Also: Nissan goes to the 24 hours of Le Mans with a car that looks like the Batmobile. And: BMW's 6 series Gran Coupe.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S01 : E94 Audi at Le Mans
programme.desc: At the 2012 Le Mans 24 Hours, Audi entered the R18 e-tron quattro for the first time. Also: the Porsche Cayenne GTS, the model between the S and the Turbo. And: the Mercedes-Benz CLS Shooting Brake.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E121 On Patrol with the Dubai Police Supercars
programme.desc: The Dubai police's fleet of patrol cars includes a Chevrolet Camaro, a Lamborghini Aventador, a Bentley GT, a Ferrari FF and more. For the first time ever, their Special Cars Unit allowed a TV crew a glimpse behind the curtain.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Small 4x4's are on the rise, as it doesn't need to be size that matters when it comes to having fun in the city or off-road. We take a look at mini SUVs, the Fiat's 500 X, the Cross Polo and Cross up! by Volkswagen and BMW's X1 XDrive.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Land Rover Experience Tour Australia
programme.desc: At the Land Rover Experience Tour Australia, 19 Land Rover Discovery Sport drive from the Northern Territory to the Gregory National Park and finally Ayers Rock. Burst tires and trapped cars are the order of the day, even complete breakdowns.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S01 : E24 The Most Exciting Classic Car Races
programme.desc: Exciting GT sports cars from the 1960s, the pre-war Silver Arrows, hot classic cars on ice and historic Formula 1 cars. We present the most exciting classic car races in Germany.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E61 Classic Cars with All-Wheel Drive
programme.desc: The Volkswagen Type 166 amphibious vehicle is the all-rounder amongst off-road vehicles. Also: the Peugeot 205 Turbo 16 all-wheeler turned the World Rally Championship in the 1980s on its head. And : the Willys Jeep in our drive report.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.sub-title: S03 : E67 Rear-wheel drive for everyone
programme.desc: Cars with a rear-wheel drive are usually considered to be agile but also a bit capricious in regards to their handling. Does this also apply to the Porsche GT3 and the Smart? In addition: the sporty midsize sedan model range, BMW's 3 Series.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Opel's Insignia Tourer Country was the German brand's first family car in outdoor attire. In addition: with the Capture Renault presented their first compact SUV. And: what happens when Fiat's cute compact 500 is inflated to the 500L Trekking?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Lexus was one of the pioneers when it comes to electric and hybrid cars. The brand's LS 600h, the BMW Active Hybrid 7 and the Porsche Panamera S E-Hybrid are prime examples of this mixture between combustion and electric propulsion.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Rolls-Royce and Bentley are the ultimate upper class status symbols. Those who prefer a sportier approach can choose from a great range of brands like Bugatti, Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche and McLaren that compete for the title of best sports car.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The cooperation between BMW and Italian designer Zagato produced a real dream car, the Z4. Also: the energy efficient sports car Fisker Karma is a very rare breed. And: Jaguar plan to present their hybrid car C-X16 in 2013.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The Fastest Cars in the World
programme.desc: Speed has always been one of the most important criteria when it comes to owning or driving a car. We show you our top 10 list of the fastest cars in the world.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 The Most Expensive Production Cars
programme.desc: Everyone knows that vehicles made by hand or in small numbers can be extremely expensive. But that can also be true for production vehicles. Here are our top 10 most expensive production cars.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: It's getting creepy at Stunt Heroes. During the filming of a horror movie, stuntwoman Anna turns into a vampire and is supposed to attack a mercenary in an action scene.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The Stunt Heroes face a new mission: performing a front-flip through the air with a stuntman behind the wheel of an estate wagon. Stuntmen Daniel and Lars display a brilliant fight choreography in some spectacular driving scenes.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Since its establishment in 1919, Bentley consistently drew attention thanks to their ongoing success in motor sports. The limited edition Continental GT3-R was one of the iconic manufacturer's sportiest cars ever.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: On the sunny island of Mallorca we made the Porsche Cayman GTS climb hills and take on a race track. In addition: the state-of-the-art Corvette C7 in a Wild West theme park. And: the Nissan 370 Z Nismo, an affordable sportscar with individual style.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E43 Automotive Legends of Recent Times
programme.desc: The history of car manufacturing goes back more than 100 years. We look at the top 10 highlights of recent automotive history.

programme.title: Top 10 Show
programme.sub-title: S01 : E35 Cars with the Most Dangerous Brakes
programme.desc: When you are on the move, the first thing you should learn is how to brake. But not all carmakers have a good hand at it. We present the top 10 cars with the worst brakes.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Blancpain Endurance Series is a racing event for grand tourers like the Ferrari 458 Italia, the McLaren MP4-12 C or the Nissan GT-R Nismo GT3. We took a look at all the action, the drivers, their cars at the 2013 competition.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.sub-title: S02 : E124 Special: 24h of Le Mans - Track Days
programme.desc: Two weeks before the start of the 24 hours of Le Mans, all teams are busy testing their cars on the traditional long distance track in France. Bad weather, accidents and a lot of tension, we documented the official test days in 2013.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Car tuner AC Schnitzer presents its ACS5 Sport model based on the BMW M5. Also: Audi's R8 models Coupe, Spyder and V10 Plus. And: a comparison between four super sports cars.

programme.title: Classic Ride
